title: Belt for shirt stay
abstract: Shirt fixing belt for a shirt (3.1) consisting of an elastic belt (1.1) secured with suitable parts (1.3, 1.4) that allow it to be used with anchoring in the lower part of the torso, above the shirt (3.1), in the area immediately below the belt space of the trousers. Because of the shirt fixing belt's length, accordingly brought is a solution that does not allow sliding of the material of the shirt (3.1) and also holds the belt (1.1) under the waistline of the trousers. In addition, the solution enables the fixation of the shirt (3.1) in the standard position, and in accordance with the anatomy of the body.
claims: Claims PATENT CLAIMS 1. A belt for shirt stay placed on the lower part of the torso below the belt consisted of an elastic strip at the ends of which a locking hook is located and a part for accepting the locking hook (locking tab), with or without the possibility of increasing the circumference, is characterized by a plurality of material segments that have the characteristic to prevent the traction in contact with the material from which the shirts or trousers are made are fastened on both sides of the belt. 2. A belt for shirt stay in accordance to the patent claim 1 , that consists of an elastic strip at the ends of which is a locking hook and a part for accepting the locking hook (locking tab), with or without the possibility of increasing the circumference, indicated by the locking hook being executed in a way that allows for closing around the circumference of the waist by clinging to last button of the shirt. 3. A belt for shirt stay according to any one of claims 1 or 2 characterized in that a plurality of segments can be replaced by an elastic strip having the same characteristics.
